* ffi_type
#+begin_src til
struct ffi_type {
    mut size : U32
    mut alignment : I16
    mut type : I16
    ref mut elements : Dynamic
namespace:
    func clone(self: ffi_type) returns ffi_type
    func delete(own self: ffi_type, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func size() returns shallow U32
}
#+end_src

* ffi_cif
#+begin_src til
struct ffi_cif {
    mut abi : I32
    mut nargs : U32
    ref mut arg_types : Dynamic
    ref mut rtype : ffi_type
    mut bytes : U32
    mut flags : U32
namespace:
    func clone(self: ffi_cif) returns ffi_cif
    func delete(own self: ffi_cif, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func size() returns shallow U32
}
#+end_src

* ffi_closure
#+begin_src til
struct ffi_closure {
namespace:
    func clone(_self: ffi_closure) returns ffi_closure
    func delete(own self: ffi_closure, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(self: ffi_closure, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func size() returns shallow U32
}
#+end_src

* ffi_closure_alloc
#+begin_src til
ext_proc ffi_closure_alloc(shallow size: U32, code: Dynamic) returns Dynamic
#+end_src

* ffi_closure_free
#+begin_src til
ext_proc ffi_closure_free(_arg: Dynamic)
#+end_src

* ffi_prep_closure_loc
#+begin_src til
ext_proc ffi_prep_closure_loc(_arg: ffi_closure, _arg: ffi_cif, fun: Dynamic, user_data: Dynamic, codeloc: Dynamic) returns shallow I32
#+end_src
